I have some inquiries about the choice of noun form (singular or plural) to be used with a plural possessive determiners (their, our, etc.) I have sought the advice of some native speakers on the following 4 sentences only to become more confused as they have different opinions. It is really really frustrating.

1a. There are many cells in *our body*.
1b. There are many cells in *our bodies*.

2a. We do this in *our everyday life*.
2b. We do this in *our everyday lives*.

A Canadian native speaker and a reply from ASKOXFORD advised that only (1b) and (2b) are correct.
An American professor of English advised that I should use (1a) and (2a) to 'avoid the problem of thinking that we have more than one body apiece' and likewise with 'life'.
A reply from Englishclub.com advised that all four are acceptable.

tone要正確
例如寫比校長要恭敬

DSE Writing Tips - Content (內容)
1. 舉例
2. 分析原因 / 影響
3. 正反對比 / 古今對比
4. 層遞
more tourists --> boost the development of tourism --> boost the economy --> more jobs
5. 分類法
short term // long term
primary school kids // secondary school students // university students
junior form students // senior form students
6. 引用權威
例如: South China Morning Post // The University of Hong Kong

DSE Writing Tips - Organization
1. 標題交代全文主旨/立場
2. 句與句之間要有聯繫，不能夠句句SVO，用連接詞、Relative Clauses、Participle Clauses連接
3. 每段第1句用標題句交代段旨
4. 每段最後1句重申段旨
5. 用過渡段承上啓下
6. 下文呼應上文
7. 首尾呼應
8. 內文呼應標題，重提標題關鍵字眼
9. 全文首尾，每段首尾扣題，重提題目關鍵字眼
10. Part A短文每個部份之間環環相扣
11. 問題和建議數目要均衡，2個問題就要有2個建議，建議針對問題

講graduates hardworking
可以話graduates為左promotion，為左climb the social ladder
面對overtime work都在所不惜

可以用public hospitals嘅nurses同doctors

例如由一間local firm轉去一間multinational corporation
workplace會完全不同

不再安分守己甘於monotonous嘅office jobs

Watching TV makes teenagers smart

A lot of TV programmes about cooking

Benefits: Teenagers can develop their interest in cooking and learn to cook some easy dishes such as vegetable soup as well as curry and chicken --> Teenagers can become smarter --> They can learn to cook for themselves and take care of themselves --> They can alleviate the burden of their parents by cooking for them
